human.title: Chamber temperature uniformity mapping
human.objective: Verify temperature uniformity across mapped locations at the target cycle temperature.
human.setup: Install calibrated thermocouples at supplier mapping points; use NIST traceable data logger.
steps: Run a representative sterilization cycle at the target temperature without product load.
Record temperature versus time at all mapped points.
Compute plateau temperature and plateau duration for each point.
human.dataToRecord: Time series for each thermocouple; maximum and minimum plateau temperatures; plateau durations.
human.acceptanceCriteria: All mapped points must be within ±2.0 °C of the setpoint during plateau and plateau duration must meet the dwell time requirement specified by the manufacturer.

human.title: Vacuum and leak performance test
human.objective: Verify vacuum pump performance, chamber leak rate, and pre‑vacuum cycle performance.
human.setup: Instrument vacuum gauge and leak test apparatus per supplier instructions.
steps: Execute a pre‑vacuum cycle and measure the vacuum level achieved.
Hold vacuum for the defined hold period and measure leak rate.
If applicable, perform helium leak detection per supplier guidance.
human.dataToRecord: Vacuum level traces, leak rate values, helium leak detector readings if performed.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Vacuum level meets supplier specification and leak rate is below supplier threshold.

human.title: Bowie‑Dick air removal test
human.objective: Verify air removal efficiency for pre‑vacuum sterilizers.
human.setup: Standardized Bowie‑Dick test pack per ISO 11140‑4.
steps: Run a Bowie‑Dick cycle using the standardized test pack.
Inspect the test pack result according to ISO 11140‑4 criteria.
human.dataToRecord: Test pack result images and pass/fail determination.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Bowie‑Dick test indicates successful air removal per manufacturer and ISO 11140‑4 guidance.

human.title: Biological indicator placement and PQ runs
human.objective: Demonstrate microbial inactivation for worst‑case loads using biological indicators.
human.setup: Place biological indicators at worst‑case locations identified in mapping; include positive and negative controls.
steps: Run PQ cycle with worst‑case load and collect BIs.
Incubate BIs per manufacturer instructions and record results.
Repeat for the required number of consecutive PQ cycles.
human.dataToRecord: BI incubation results, cycle logs, load maps.
human.acceptanceCriteria: All biological indicators show no growth after incubation per BI manufacturer instructions; physical parameters meet OQ acceptance for each PQ run.

human.title: Audit trail integrity test
human.objective: Verify that the computerized data system records immutable audit trails and that audit trails cannot be altered without detection.
human.setup: Access to CDS with test user accounts and audit trail viewer.
steps: Perform a sequence of controlled actions (create, modify, delete) using test accounts.
Verify audit trail entries record user, timestamp, and action.
Attempt an authorized and an unauthorized modification and verify detection mechanisms.
human.dataToRecord: Audit trail entries, screenshots, user account logs.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Audit trail records all actions with user and timestamp; unauthorized modifications are detected and logged.

human.title: {{testId}}
human.objective: Execute the supplier recommended verification for {{testId}}.
human.setup: Follow supplier documentation and applicable standards.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Meet supplier acceptance criteria or applicable standard.
